variants.title: HiFi Filter SACV 02065 Cover
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SACV 02065 Cover. Easy to install and replace, the SACV 02065 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: COVER, Dimension 1 (D1): 297.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 259.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 200.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 154.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 44.0 mm
